extraction.one_line_summary: GODON Dorian won from the break after a peloton miscalculation left an 18-second gap inside 2.5km, holding off the sprint favorites at the line.
tactical_patterns: KORETZKY Viktor, former MTB world bronze medalist, bridged to final climb break showing cross-discipline attackers excel on late hybrid terrain.
KRAGH ANDERSEN Søren attacked alone 15km out in 7th GC, revealing Trek's willingness to sacrifice GC position for stage hunting.
Peloton misjudged catch timing inside 5km, allowing 18-second gap to persist, suggesting fatigue calculation errors on longest stage (213.6km).
MADOUAS Valentin dominated KOM points in break, indicating intentional jersey defense strategy rather than stage win ambition.

rider_signals.GODON Dorian: positive: First pro win from break on longest stage shows exceptional endurance capacity for 23-year-old
rider_signals.KRAGH ANDERSEN Søren: neutral: Solo attack from 7th GC with 15km remaining suggests frustration or team directive to abandon classification
rider_signals.KORETZKY Viktor: positive: MTB background enabled successful bridge to leaders on final categorized climb, tactical advantage on technical climbing
rider_signals.HOLMES Matthew: neutral: Picked up KOM points despite being caught, showing points-jersey tactics over stage ambition
rider_signals.MADOUAS Valentin: positive: Controlled break to secure KOM jersey points, demonstrating experienced break management for classification goals
rider_signals.BOL Cees: negative: Named sprinter present but unable to contest reduced bunch sprint after 213km stage
rider_signals.HAYTER Ethan: negative: Mentioned as present but ineffective in reduced sprint, suggesting endurance limitations on longest stages
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: negative: Expected to contest sprint but team miscalculated catch, revealing coordination failure under fatigue
rider_signals.LAPORTE Christophe: negative: Chased bonus sprint but team failed final catch, exposing tactical disconnect in prolonged efforts
rider_signals.ROGLIČ Primož: neutral: Retained yellow with minimal effort on flat stage, armchair ride confirms team control before mountain stages
